name: french-politics-for-noobs

seal-blue.usage: Nav and hero band backgrounds only

civic-amber.usage: The sole interactive accent. Links, primary buttons, timeline numerals.

fade-up.keyframes: from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(10px) } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) }

pageLoad.description: data-enter="1|2|3|4" on elements inside the hero band, staggered by 120ms per step

scrollReveal.description: IntersectionObserver in Layout.astro module script. Cards use inline transition-delay for stagger.

whisper-hover.usage: Applied on hover via .js-card class. Never at rest.

card-interactive.description: All interactive cards use js-card for whisper hover + js-reveal for scroll entrance

nav.langToggle: text-xs font-semibold text-amber-400 border border-amber-700 hover:bg-civic-800 hover:text-amber-200

verify-badge.css: display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:2px; font-size:0.7rem; font-family:Figtree; font-weight:500; background:oklch(94% 0.022 70); color:oklch(40% 0.10 65); border:1px solid oklch(82% 0.07 70); border-radius:9999px; padding:1px 6px 1px 5px;
verify-badge.usage: Wrap unverified claims. Always include warning emoji inside.

timeline-year.layout: Two-column: year column 3.5rem wide right-aligned, entry column with 1px amber-200 left-border

designInvariants: All content must have .fr-content / .en-content language toggle duplicates
Party colors as color badges max 44x44px only — never as UI backgrounds
Whisper hover only — no resting-state shadows
Civic amber is the sole interactive accent on light surfaces
Civic blue is structural (nav/hero) only — never used as an accent on light pages
Every border, divider, and card outline uses the amber-200 vellum-edge value
No gradient text, no glassmorphism, no border-left stripes > 1px
All new color values in OKLCH — never sRGB hex outside the defined scale
